audit_trail.subject: I want to return my watch

audit_trail.thinking: The customer is requesting a return and refund for their smart watch. To resolve this, I need to check the order details, customer profile, and product information. I also need to verify the refund eligibility before taking any further action.

The customer is reporting a defective coffee maker and is requesting a replacement or refund. To resolve this issue, I need to check the order details, customer profile, and product information. I also need to verify if the customer is eligible for a refund.

result.reason: Order is within return window and eligible for refund
Return window expired (34 days since delivery, window is 30 days)

data.content: Customers can return most items within 30 days of delivery. Electronics must be unused and in original packaging. Some products have extended return windows (e.g., laptop stands: 60 days). Items registered online may not be eligible for return.
VIP customers may receive extended return windows and exceptions on a case-by-case basis as noted in their account.
